entry.title: Refunct v1.2.2a0
entry.content:
### v1.2.2 -> v1.2.2a (mod only update, same apworld and yaml as v1.2.2) - Removed the debug cheat I forgot to disable last time, whoops :) - Minimap is now on by default for new players. - You can now choose between wall jumps and dash in block brawl (press T to toggle while in block brawl).
### v1.2.1 -> v1.2.2 Gameplay - You can now use the normal jump key to dash while in the air in the mountain minigames. (thanks @nepcore !) - If you press jump again after the dash, you'll do a downward dash. Movement feels cool to me?
Fixes & features - Fixed item & location count not adding up - Fixed Universal Tracker problems - Added yamlless Universal Tracker support (I think...)
Yaml - Changed **default yaml**: all minigames are possible to appear now with different weights, 7 will be chosen at random.
Removed stuff D: - I removed the "Just Clique" option which would turn the entire game into just 2 locations, seemed like a fun meme but I'm too scared it might give (progression balancing) generating problems and people might not expect/want this in their multiworld.
### v1.2.0 -> v1.2.1 - Made flowers filler again (whoops)
# Version 1.1.x->1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Oh So Hero! v0.16.8
entry.content:
Some location where badly named or straight up wrong.
This is now fixed with all zones listed and locations well indicated.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/L-technology-mods/Archipelago-Oh-So-Heroe/compare/v0.16.7...v0.16.8

entry.title: Rain World v1.6.0
entry.content:
# See [the setup page](https://github.com/alphappy/ArchipelagoRW/blob/v1.5.0/worlds/rain_world/docs/setup_en.md) for instructions. # This release is intended to be used with [v1.6.0+ of the client](https://github.com/SaltiestSyrup/RWRandomizer/releases/tag/v1.6.0), and version 0.6.7+ of Archipelago.
## New Features - Hell Spears added as a possible filler item. (c8cb5a71a6a0dabfc797d2120f34101668644113) - Rivulet's Longer Cycles item is now split into two items, Longer Cycles and Disable Five Pebbles. (071ae6357279f4fc3ab176cf6cbd1f774bc866c9) - Watcher can now optionally include Weaver Encounter checks. (846638ee96b4a87005ff5c3b065c24a6763499a6) - The Weaver ability can now be randomized, creating 4 Progressive Weaver items. (846638ee96b4a87005ff5c3b065c24a6763499a6)
## Logic Fixes - Fix middle Outer Rim being considered accessible with Ripple 3. (5a65f555779cdab3d5efaf257e6dd0db0065c42b) - Fix Shattered Terrace Spinning Top check not requiring Ripplespace access. (208b7d2c1131a3e630f3120aa6e03cbe35fc9f22) - Traps with a DLC requirement will no longer generate on slots without the relevant DLC enabled. (284a3d214560f19eaacad7edeffa9d43767c8e2a) - SB_S01 now considered part of the filtration sub-region for glow logic. (09926f57d03e711cdea84959eaea41d5ca2a2e31) - Fix Ripplespace minimum requirement option not being used everywhere it should be. (17945449d38d2bad3065ce67d90c6bcd90ed51e0)
## Misc Changes - Migrated most of the logic to use Rule Builder, which enables the use of /explain and similar commands in Universal Tracker. (#261) - Fix inconsistent capitalization in item names. (cf41f446387c2016d448b97613d3d20c6799ee9b) - Change how the victory condition handles Watcher goals. Weaver is now an alias of Echoes ending, and choosing True Ending for slugcats other than Watcher will be interpreted as Ascension ending. (d0ccd650deee4af3a6ba97004ce7aa999e00825a) - Fix Warp items not being hint-able with swapped region order. (671e34597f290d92658fc64d17daa1523d2078a3) - Karma flowers on the other end of Spinning Top warps are once again included in the item pool, as the client now forces them to persist. (aca21e962c33c4ab6279a65b0b8e06e51ec4bef5)

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.2
entry.content:
# Bug Fixes * Fix Target and Medal goal checking being skipped if the Score goal is passed * Fix Target goal not properly checking if a Pokémon is caught * Overall error resilience
# Other Changes * Added item/location groups

entry.title: Celeste (Open World) v1.1.2
entry.content:
v1.1.2 of the Archipelago Open World mod and APWorld for Celeste.
Mod is fully backwards-compatible with seeds generated with v1.0.x APWorlds.
Changelog since v1.1.1:
```md ### Bug Fixes: - Fixed building up too much speed with Down Diagonal Dashes and no Crouch - Fixed unintended interactions with Dream Blocks and locked Dash directions - Fixed Strawberry Counter occasionally being reset on disconnects - Added `Core C - Springs` - Fixed swapped Strawberry locations in `Mirror Temple A Room d-15` - Several logic fixes ```

entry.title: Pokemon Pinball Ruby & Sapphire v0.2.3
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fixed Bonus Stages location group being invalid

entry.title: Divinity Original Sin 2 v0.5.0r2r2
entry.content:
Changes: - Containersanity setting had been added, still work in progress. Functions in act 1 alone, do not enabled outside of act 1 goals.
Bugfixes: - Confirmed path fix for linux - Fixed Magister Ellwin, Magister Swentin, and Source Hound Phylip not correctly sending checks - Fixed Saltwater Crocodile naming scheme
This release is NOT backwards compatible with 0.5.0.
Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)
DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)

entry.title: Everhood 2 v0.4.8
entry.content:
> [!IMPORTANT] > While many softlocks have been fixed. Some softlocks may still occur. Some areas were untested such as Green Route 3 and many Hilbert Hotel rooms. Please bring my attention to them in Discord if they occur.
> [!NOTE] > Minimum version of the APWorld is now 0.6.7. > THE APWORLD HAS NO UPDATE FOR THIS RELEASE, IT DOES NOT NEED TO BE UPDATED.
See 0.4.2 patch notes for the main changes: https://github.com/DeamonHunter/ArchipelagoEverhood2/releases/tag/v0.4.2 ## Changes - Added support for "Irvine's Mailbox" located in the Time Hub.
## Mod Fixes - When entering Marzian Year 0 again, the final cutscene area will no longer trigger, instead you will be teleported to the Cosmic Hub. - When going back to the main hubs, the animation of the player should be reset. Preventing the player from getting locked in the stunned animation after Marzian Year 0.
## AP World Fixes - Fixed the Universal Tracker Implementation not having the correct amount of Power Gems needed for the Dragon.
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Everhood 2's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Everhood 2 in the list of games. - If Everhood 2 does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `Everhood 2 .exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Everhood 2 on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Everhood 2 in the list of games. - If Everhood 2 does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `Everhood 2.exe`. 4. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
## Mod Install
1.Download `ArchipelagoEverhood.zip`. 2. Head to the Everhood 2 folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: Touhou Youyoumu ~ Perfect Cherry Blossom v1.2.3.post2
entry.content: - @ManDude Fix bossCounter not being reset properly between stage in normal mode when a previous stage has already been completed in a previous run - Fix Power Points being reset between stage in normal mode - Add a try/except to the reset of the boss presence memory address

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.3.0r2r2
entry.content:
Minor release - 0.3.2

Thank you very much to everyone who has been playing and finding bugs or things to improve. This patch should address most issues.

Changes

- Added Gustav's gift as a check. Shoutout to @ET_is_here for reminding me this exists. - Added secret Doki Herbs in Anuri Temple crawlspace as checks. Shoutout to @Pinkowlcat for telling me these exist (I never knew). - The accessibility settings text at the start of the game can now be sped up like most dialog in the game. This should save you a couple of seconds when starting a new game. - Logic no longer excludes Rocket Boots as a way to open the Panselo gates. - A couple of other logic bugs have been fixed. Shoutout to @fight4day for finding and fixing these!

Bug fixes

- The Ouroboros guard in front of the first trial and the sand drifts southern tree check now correctly drop money when the check contains rin. - Lisa and Boar boy now give a filler item when their corresponding setting is disabled. - The Baroque of Battle will apply its attack bonus attack when being played. - The two chocolate sprites at the first shop item of the Rhodus checkpoint have been removed. Full patch notes of 0.3 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.3.0)

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.9.0
entry.content: - Adds **"Lawn Link"**. This unique setting allows all Plants vs. Zombies players in a MultiWorld to directly interact with each other's lawns. This means **you can place plants on each other's lawns - or remove them!** The % chance of each action being triggered can be individually configured. Please let me know if you run into any odd behaviour with this! - Adds **"Seed Link"**. This setting allows all Plants vs. Zombies players in a MultiWorld to trigger each other's seed packet cooldowns. - Adds an option to **lock each zombie type in "I, Zombie" levels behind receiving corresponding items.** - Adds an option to **prevent conveyor belts from serving you plants you haven't yet unlocked**. - Adds an option to **prevent Vasebreaker from serving you plants you haven't yet unlocked**. - You can now **delete save files in-game, without having to remove the Archipelago mod**. - **Adds the following item groups**: "Level", "Plant", "Adventure", "Day", "Night", "Pool", "Fog", "Roof", "Mini-games", "Puzzle", "Survival", "Bonus Levels" and "Cloudy Day". - Slightly reduces the chances of early game being completely shop-focused. - Fixes a bug where plants could fire so fast that they wouldn't end up firing at all. - Fixes a bug where randomised pea damage would apply in places where it shouldn't. - Fixes a problem with item plando being ignored.

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.0
entry.content:
## New features * Split qualities and space locations into separate items when split technologies is on by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/38 * Implements start inventory from pool by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/39
## Improvements * Set technologies as essential if they contain an advancement item by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/48 * Move more texts to static locale file by @Enderdraak in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/53 * Add uranium-fuel-cell and steam from boiler to logic by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/60
## Fixes * Sort craftsanity item pool to ensure consistent ordering by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/51 * Fix free samples crashing when there is a platform pending construction by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/54, https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/56 * Resync non-tech unlocks on technology effect reset by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/55
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.3.0...platformer-0.4.0

entry.title: Mario Super Sluggers v0.4.0
entry.content:
- Added support for an optional patching system. AP will now generate a patch file that can be applied using [this patcher](<https://github.com/MarioManTAW/mss-ap-patcher>). Current features of the patch: - Lakitu will say the correct number of players required to face Bowser Jr. rather than always saying 9. - Shop items can be previewed before purchase. - Fixed the client failsafe for the "Hit a sacrifice fly to score a run" mission.
Check out the [setup guide](<https://github.com/MarioManTAW/Archipelago/blob/sluggers/worlds/mario_super_sluggers/docs/setup_en.md>) for setup procedures. You may also find the [PopTracker pack](<https://github.com/MarioManTAW/MarioSuperSluggersAPTracker/releases>) helpful.

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2r2r2r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed Wizard Hatch not triggering the dialogue properly (I hope?) - Don't grant the starting quest if you already did it - When using an ER setting that affects festivals, festivals no longer lock doors in town - Fixed an issue with multisleep from the chat. I broke it last time. - Fixed Meeting modded NPCs - Fixed an issue where festivals could trigger on their original date as well as their new date - Big rework to FIBS, to give better info with fish DR (Please test this and offer feedback) - Fixed an issue where some fish did not bring their original behaviors or data when being moved to a different location

entry.title: Sly 2: Band of Thieves v1.0.0
entry.content:
Sly 2 Archipelago implementation. For setup instructions, check out the [README](https://github.com/NikolajDanger/APSly2/blob/main/README.md).
## Changes ### Features - Traps have been added. - New goal type: Pick & Mix. P&M allows you to choose a selection of conditions required for your goal yourself. This allows for goals like "all bosses except Clock-la" or "all episodes and all vaults". - New episode 8 unlock mode: Gradual. Each 1/4 of the total required Clockwerk parts will unlock a section of episode 8. - RingLink has been added (I haven't had the opportunity to test this one). - New icon by MikkMakk_. - Added new location and item groups to use in the yaml.
### Bug fixes and improvements - Several attempts at fixing the memory leak. Maybe this time it works. - Small change to yaml-free Universal Tracker support. - Fixing problem where "Operation: Trojan Horse" checkmark would be available even though it wasn't in logic. - README, yaml, error message, and in-game clarifications on a few things that have been a bit confusing. - A couple tracker map fixes. - Attempt to fix the problem where guards spawn with default pickpocket loot settings. - Fixed the issue where UT would think you're go-mode prematurely. - Fixed the logic for the All Vaults goal. No one had noticed, but it was very wrong :grimacing:.

entry.title: YARG v0.0.21
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the YARN Request Pack 3 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added YARN Request Pack 3 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/46
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.20...0.0.21

entry.title: Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster v1.0.2
entry.content:
## Highlights
**The big one:** the crash when leaving 10 or more party members behind in another area is fixed. Large parties are fully supported — the cause was the other-map HP widget overflowing its vanilla-sized pool after loading screens and cutscenes. While your party is scattered, the widget shows up to 8 members and restores automatically when you regroup.
## Fixes
- **Party crash** — no more crashing after loading screens/cutscenes when 10+ party members were left in another zone. - **The "Burt bug"** — survivors spawning dead or not spawning at all are now detected and repaired automatically on area transitions. No more console commands needed. - **Extra PP locations** — "Use N Microwaves/Stoves/Clothing Racks" progress no longer resets between play sessions. - **Unsendable locations** — fixed four location checks that could never send due to name mismatches: *Meet back at the Security Room at 11am day 3*, *Meet back at the Security Room at 5pm day 3*, *Witness Special Forces 10pm day 3*, and a redundant *Kill Kent on day 3* sender. - **Connection resilience** — all run tracking (checks, scoops, stickers, stats) now lives in a single file per seed and resyncs with the server on every connect. Disconnecting mid-session can no longer permanently miss locations. - **"Failed to Save" diagnosed** — Steam limits this game to roughly **200 MB of save data total**, counting your vanilla saves *and* every AP seed's save folder. See the README's new [Save Data and the "Failed to Save" Error](../../blob/main/README.md#save-data-and-the-failed-to-save-error) section for cleanup steps. The mod now captures diagnostics automatically when a save fails, and warns you loudly if you connect mid-game (which breaks saving until the game is restarted).
## Updating
1. Replace the contents of `reframework/autorun` with the new mod files. 2. Replace `drdr.apworld` in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder. 3. Existing progress migrates automatically the first time each seed connects — no manual steps.
Recommended: disable Steam Cloud for Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster (Properties → General) while playing AP — details in the README.

entry.title: The Binding of Isaac Repentance v0.3.0r2
entry.content: Lot's of QoL changes More options in the yaml Goals can now be tied to characters Bugfixes

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r3r2
entry.content: - Fixed FIBS getting confused by magic bait only fish - Fixed Sandy's meet event not playing until you meet Emily - Crab pot fish default difficulty when turned into fishing rod fish reduced from 50 to 45, to allow training rod catches - Fixed an issue where shunning days were added for every npc instead of once (so shunning lasted very, very long!)

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.1.2
entry.content:
Updates to apworld: - Palette option overhaul. Options are now Named Range options allowing you to pick a standard color or specify any RGB value as an int (convert hex RGB values to decimal in your calculator). - Logic fixes for THI region connections and BBH coins. - Fixes a server crash caused by invalid entrance hints being generated for event locations. - A BITFS location was renamed.
Changes have been made to the sm64ex build since the last release. Technically backwards compatibility should exist both ways, but you should rebuild to latest sm64ex: - BBH Second Floor and Secret Room Vanish Cap block location checks have been reversed from their incorrect assignments. - VCUTM text on the Levels menu is no longer overlapping other text. - Now accepts hat color assignment. Hat will continue using shirt color for games generated before 0.1.2.
Hotfix for sm64ex: - DDD Poles item will not spawn Bowser's Sub. - The Bowser door blocking the big hole in DDD will spawn by default and disappear when the Poles item is obtained.

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2r2r2r2r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed crash when connecting to a 7.x.x multiworld. Now it should display the error properly - Merge dropped items from a butterfingers trap to reduce lag - Fixed butterfingers chests dropping their items on the wrong map

entry.title: Splasher v0.0.6.post2
entry.content:
# Splasher Archipelago Client (v.0.0.6) -- Keys Update
**Be sure to use newest [Client](https://github.com/Frisk202020/SplasherArchipelago/releases) as well (v.0.0.6)**
## New features
This version mainly implements **keys** to access levels. This adds the `Include Keys` option, which comes with two flavors : - level keys : as simple as it can be : each level is locked behind its key - (thematic) zone keys : the game is split into 6 zones, each having its key
The game is split into these zones : - **Reception Hub** : includes *Potatoes Ink* (2), *Stick to the Plan* (3), *There will be Fries* (7) - **Water Pool** : includes *Jump on the Water* (5), *A Bad Encounter* (6), *Stick on the Water* (9), *Water is Coming* (13) - **Fun Park** : includes *Let it Bounce* (4), *Ink in Park* (10), *Big Bounce Theory* (15) - **Ray Man Paradise** : includes *Ray Man Origin* (8), *Troopers Please* (12), *Ray Man Legend* (18), *The Glados Principle* (20) - **Toxink Hell** : includes *Toxink Bubbles* (16), *Toxink Avenger* (19), *Apocalink Now* (21) - **Docteur's Office** : has the key for the final level (*Good Luck Splasher*)
*Note : whatever your setting is, your starting level is Welcome to Inkorp*
You can also enable *speedrun keys*, which makes *Time Attack* to have its own keys (level or zone depending on your setting).
## Improvements
- Changed how *Splashers* are collected, now being sent to Archipelago as soon as their state would be saved (that is, when they would stay collected even after a death). Importantly, this allows **vortex splashers** to be collected without a checkpoint. - Fixed various logic issues, and reworked some splashers locations to match the change of their collect. - Added items groups. Some clients take avantage of this feature.
## Contributions
Thanks a lot to [Evoker](https://github.com/Ung-W) for making a [PopTracker](https://github.com/Ung-W/Splasher-AP-Poptracker/releases/) for this world ! It is the recommended tracker to experience this game, but you can also use the Universal tracker (though it seems currently to not be compatible with progressive powers).

entry.title: Donkey Kong Toluca v1.0.1
entry.content:
whoops # Changes * Changed some client messages to actually tell they're from Toluca instead of DKC2 * Reverted the change that disallowed cogs from being added into the pool * They need to exist as an alternate way to enter Krematoa levels without Bonus Coins (makes GitHub test happier)
# KNOWN ISSUES * World progress (Clear) label will be miscolored during the intro sequence and exiting worlds * Trade sequence shuffle does not edit the original text at all. * Trade sequence might be broken with collect? Didn't test lol. * Apparently saving after completing Kastle KAOS breaks the save? The client get everything back to you anyway...

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.10
entry.content: luigi ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) ## Changes * Luigi Physics * Option to enable the feature is now visible * Allows you to play with SMA2's Luigi Physics (floaty, somewhat slow) * DOES NOT ALTER LOGIC IN ANY FORM. And never will. Feel free to get out of logic. * Fixed getting stuck in castle cutscenes * Removed castle destruction cutscenes * Fixed the rare case where two exits can lead to the same entrance * Special World Clear item is now considered "deprioritized" * Too lazy to update the credits version number

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2
entry.content: - Allow using `!!sleep end of month` - Prevent events from starting *during* a multisleep. This fixes one of my longstanding nemesis, the grandpa bug! - When waking up homeless, but a cutscene is playing, allow the player to stay in the house for the duration of the cutscene. This prevents bugs related to warping the player to the farm during a cutscene. This fixes the new grandpa bug! - Prevent the makeover trap from deleting pans being worn on head

entry.title: Hades v0.15.1r2
entry.content:
Adding a bunch of new options:
- Death link amnesty: Hades can avoid sending a deathlink "each death", but rather wait for a bunch of them before sending one deathlink. Makes dying a bit less painful for your friends. - Ability randomization: Now one can randomization the Attack, Special, Dash, Cast and Call abilities. Though the game was too easy? Trying it now without dash! Can be selected to be global or per weapon. - Mirror randomization: Do you want a death defiance? you need to work for it! Now all mirror bonuses can be randomized. This adds 150 locations on the mirror, that were the old "unlocks" for this abilities. You can still use the mirror to show how much of each ability you currently have equipped. - Internal trove Randomization: "Ah I am playing AP, I will ignore infernal troves..." not anymore! Now infernal troves have 4 items for beating the challenge in 60,45,30 and 15 seconds. Time to start practicing those challenges. - Fish randomization: games need to have a fishing minigame to be truly games, so we needed to step up. Now fish locations can be selected to become items in the item pool. Happy fishing! - Accelerated Keepsake level up: keepsakes now level up three times faster when equipped. Makes keepsakes more balanced for shorter AP sessions and less annoying for longer ones.
Death link Amnesty by @kylecrayne Ability Randomization, Mirror randomization, Infernal trove randomization, Fish randomization, Accelerated Keepsake level up by @ColgateSupreme

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed the Benjamin trap using unqualified IDs and sometimes confusing mini shipping bins for garlics - Try to detect if you're being shunned for too long due to a previous bug, and if so, reduce pariah shunning days to a single trap's worth

entry.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.2.0.post2
entry.content:
# v0.2.0 Recipe Rando and visual overhaul **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.1.2...yohane_bitdb-v0.2.0
# New Features - Recipesanity, randomizes the ingredients required for crafting items - Craftsanity, randomizes the results of crafting recipes, turning them into checks - Received Items are now displayed with an item popup on the left (found items for other games are not displayed) - Save files store the current slot name and seed name, preventing loading of vanilla or other seed's save files
# Internal - Tests have been added - Debug info is displayed by default when running from source - massive client refactor

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.22.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * chore(release): v0.21.0 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/155 * docs(release): document the PR-based main-landing flow by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/156 * feat(transport-rando): re-enable Hanubia<->Itorash capsule shuffle by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/157 * fix(setup): pin exlaunch bridge to the fs-fix merge (PR #6) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/158 * fix(patcher): guard the Switch save-fs 64-byte entry-name cap by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/159 * fix(patcher): pin open-dread-rando fork fixing the s080/s090 multi-model pickup crash by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/160
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.21.0...v0.22.0

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.3.5a0
entry.content: - Incremented version number - Fixed duplicate world unlock items (for real this time)

entry.title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus v0.4.1
entry.content:
- Fixed an error preventing players from connecting if starting world was set to random and avoid early BK was enabled - Fixed an error preventing players from being granted received thief moves - Fixed an error that caused extra episode unlock items to be created if starting world was set to "All" - Added item groups and location groups (@phoenixaki) - Adds support for speed tricks via new YAML option (@phoenixaki) - Improved documentation (@phoenixaki)
NOTE: This update changes the names of many existing items. This should still be compatible with worlds generated on v0.3.0 and onward, but you may wish to avoid upgrading if you're in the middle of a seed.

entry.title: Paper Mario v0.6.7
entry.content:
## Other
* AP data for trackers * Add bouncing of the player's current location in the game world, so trackers and other tools can access this information live.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2r2
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.2
entry.content:
# Minecraft Fabric (1.1.2)
Was planning on having this out sooner, but held off due to wanting to get some bigger stuff here. Decided that it would be best to release the bugfix now and do the bigger stuff a little later.
Mod Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/archipelago-mod AP World Link: https://github.com/Deadlydiamond98/MinecraftFabricAPWorld/releases Wiki: https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod
Changelog:
Minecraft
- Fixed a logic where Stone Tools were required for anything that requires smelting to be in logic - Fixed Wither Summoning Being off-screen in the item tracker - Changed the Chance for Wither Skeletons to drop skulls when the option is enabled from 25% to 50% - Hired Help now requires Shears - Piglin Heads now require Nether Access - Updated Logic for suspicious sand and gravel to account for Cobwebs - Sculk Items are now under exploration - Dry Sponge now requires Smelting - Sniffer Egg is now considered a Hard Item - Black Dye now either requires Swimming or Wither Summoning - Updated Logic For Smooth Stone and Smooth Deepslate - Fixed Clay ball requiring Nether Access (No idea how this happened) - Chests, Bottles, Brushes, Buckets, Fishing Rods, Flint & Steel / Igniters, Minecarts, Shields, & Shears now lock things in their respective Common tags
Create
- fixed logic error with Raw Zinc where it also required Compacting to be considered in logic - fixed logic error where Copper Diving Helmets were considered in logic before getting proper armor tier.
Iron Chests: Restocked
- Fixed Chest Upgrades being locked behind Chests & Barrels (as they don’t require chests nor allow for obtaining chests)

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed items in Mr Qi's shop with randomized price but not currency, accidentally costing twice as much as they should - Fixed a bug where using parrot express then going to the same island map could get the player stuck in cutscene state - Fixed Legend of the Winter Star not sending when christmas is on the wrong date - Changed ghost cows so that petting them increases their despawn chance for the day

entry.title: Hatsune Miku Project Diva Mega Mix+ v1.5.1b0
entry.content:
# Changelog:
# World - Added two songs to the item pool - Added `Grasssanity` item group - Changed defaults of `Duplicate Songs` and `Traps` to 50% - Improvements to the JSON generator and mod string handling - Switched to rule builder
# Mod - Switched to imgui docking so the tabs can be used as windows - Opt-in from `Advanced > Styling`. Make sure to save your settings! - General system stability improvements to enhance the user's experience

entry.title: Hades v0.16.1
entry.content:
Various balancing fixes. Mirror upgrades (items and locations) should be scattered more uniformly through the run. Changing the logic for "defeating a boss", so it checks that we are instead able to get to the next region, making spheres more balanced.
Done with @ColgateSupreme.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past v1.2.2r2
entry.content: Fixed a bug where the client would crash when receiving an item from a player with an ID above 255.

entry.title: Oblivion Remastered v0.5.1
entry.content:
## How to use
For Archipelago instructions, see https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/
1) Generate a new Archipelago multiworld. 2) Launch the Oblivion Remastered Client from the ArchipelagoLauncher.exe. 3) Connect to your server. 4) Once connected, you can launch Oblivion Remastered through your mod manager and start playing.
## v0.5.0 New Features:
- Kill Tracking - Nirnroot Locations - Exploration Sidequests - Wealth Sidequests - Traps - Deathlink - Automated Boss Chest & Nirnroot Tracking - Treasure Hunter Goal - Nirnsanity Goal
## v0.5.1 Update:
- Added doomstone checks option - Nirnroot region batching for non-nirnsanity goal - Expanded gold locations for treasure hunter goal - Deathlink tweaks

entry.title: YARG v0.0.22
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
Changes: - Update YARN Request Pack 3
## What's Changed * Update song list to reflect changes to YARN Request Pack 3 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/49
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.21...0.0.22

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.3
entry.content: Reverts some stuff in text formatting

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.4
entry.content: small code updates, some logic fixes, klobber karnage sucks ## Info * [Info](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/index.html) * [Trivia (REQUIRED TO PLAY)](https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest) ## Changes * Updated Lost World Rock item placement code so it sucks less * Changed some rules to use macros, macros can be used with UT's `/explain` * Trivia error message updated to tell the player they're missing the trivia apworld more clearly * Updated loose logic * Everything about Klobber Karnage * KONG and Clear in Krockhead Klamber no longer require Kannons * Banana Coin 1 & 2 in Web Woods can require Cartwheel to reach * Green Balloon 1 in Web Woods uses the expert logic * Updated expert logic * Mainbrace Mayhem Bonus 1 & Banana Bunch 1 no longer requires Hover or Cartwheel when using Diddy * Banana Coin 1 & 2 in Web Woods uses loose logic

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.13
entry.content:
## Mod - Fixed the Junimo Kart leaderboards potentially crashing when NPCs don't exist - Implemented Reverse Trap
## Apworld - Fixed name of `Meet Caroline` location. The typo made it not generate this location at all - Fixed the biggest bug ever™. All other_requirements on sources were getting lost in DR - Added missing NPC existence rules to various quests and cutscenes - Added more sanitization to fish DR, notably night market fish in winter, island fish in summer, etc. - Fixed Marlon and Gunther rules when the Jasper mod is active and they turn real - Remove the robin money-making rule when using unshuffled tools because it often turned recursive - Slight optimization of season rules - Always randomize entrances for obelisks and warp totems, instead of relying on endgame locations being enabled, since the items are always in the pool - Make sure crab pot fish that turn into fishing rod fish, roll a low difficulty if difficulties aren't DRed - Added Reverse Trap

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.6.2
entry.content:
Bugfix for Prime Cup rental list. Pika Cup rental list in `constants` had Pokémon included that should not have been, which was causing the patcher to overwrite some of the Prime Cup list and break it.
Fixed the gender symbol bug for the Nidorans.

entry.title: The Binding of Isaac Repentance v0.4.1
entry.content: Fuzzer, manifest, determinism and UT compatibility fixes

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16909823
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision fixed the top grade rule for Rugged Ridge when DLC is disabled.
